executive_summary: Lorie's local service business relies entirely on manual processes, with enquiries tracked in spreadsheets and follow-ups handled by hand, leading to lost leads and poor visibility. She wants to establish a simple CRM workflow and automated follow-up before exploring more advanced solutions like AI phone agents. The immediate priority is replacing spreadsheet tracking with a centralized system that captures both phone and email enquiries.

pain_points.title: Manual spreadsheet data entry
pain_points.description: All customer enquiry details are entered by hand into spreadsheets, creating delays and risk of human error.

pain_points.title: Manual follow-up execution
pain_points.description: Follow-up messages for quotes and reminders are sent manually, consuming significant time and leading to inconsistent communication.

pain_points.title: Lost customer tracking and missed quotes
pain_points.description: Without a unified workflow, the team frequently loses track of which customers require quotes or reminders, resulting in missed revenue opportunities.

quick_wins.title: Deploy a simple CRM with intake forms
quick_wins.description: Replace spreadsheets with a free CRM that captures email enquiries automatically via forms and provides a central dashboard for quote and reminder tracking.

quick_wins.title: Automate email follow-up sequences
quick_wins.description: Set up automated email workflows within the CRM to send quote follow-ups and reminders based on deal stage or last contact date.

deeper_opportunities.title: AI phone agent for enquiry intake
deeper_opportunities.description: Once the CRM workflow is mature, implement an AI phone agent to handle initial enquiries, qualify leads, and log details directly into the CRM.

deeper_opportunities.title: End-to-end intake automation
deeper_opportunities.description: Integrate phone, email, and web forms into a fully automated pipeline that routes enquiries, schedules reminders, and updates deal stages without manual input.

tool_recommendations.name: HubSpot CRM
tool_recommendations.purpose: Centralize customer data, track quotes, and automate follow-up emails and reminders

tool_recommendations.name: Zapier
tool_recommendations.purpose: Connect email inbox and web forms to the CRM to trigger automated workflows and reduce manual data entry

actions: Sign up for HubSpot CRM and import existing spreadsheet data
Create intake forms for web and email enquiries
Set up basic deal stages for quotes and reminders
Configure automated email follow-up sequences for quote reminders
Connect email inbox via Zapier to log enquiries automatically
Train team on new CRM workflow and dashboard
Review follow-up performance and adjust messaging
Identify remaining manual phone intake gaps
Document requirements and budget for future AI phone agent
